commands: uv run python -m med_autoscience.cli workspace progress-portal --profile "$PROFILE" --format json
uv run python -m med_autoscience.cli runtime live-console --profile "$PROFILE" --snapshot --format json
observed_assertions: Progress Portal profile-only entry materializes without single-study crash
Live Console profile snapshot does not default-select 001
DM002 and DPCC003 are distinguishable by study_id
Portal source_refs contain no med-deepscientist or .ds/worktrees refs
terminal tail refs resolve to runtime quest paths without last_launch_report.json/.ds path joins

functions.cannot_absorb_reason: Medical publication quality and readiness require MAS domain judgment.
OPL can transport reviewer work but cannot issue medical reviewer verdicts.
Artifact mutation changes submission-facing medical deliverables.
Memory body and accept/reject decisions remain domain-owned.
Medical source sufficiency and study readiness are MAS domain verdicts.
Only MAS can sign domain receipt, blocker, and safe action authority.
Domain helper code encodes medical research semantics rather than generic runtime shell.

closed_functional_structure_gates.evidence_required: OPL generated surfaces available, active callers migrated, focused no-regression lane green
SQLite/lifecycle, outbox, storage, source, memory, artifact, portal, and supervisor shells only expose refs/blockers/receipts
no-active-caller scan, old generated artifact absent/remove proof, provenance retained, focused cleanup tests green
OPL App/Workbench displays refs, freshness, blockers, owners, and action receipt routing
OPL lifecycle/index ledger consumes MAS lifecycle refs without writing MAS truth, memory body, or artifacts

remaining_evidence_gates.evidence_required: multi paper-line OPL provider attempts leave MAS owner receipts and no-forbidden-write proof
more real paper-line accepted/rejected/blocked router receipts and body-free inventory refs
real workspace cleanup, restore, retention, rebuild, and artifact-authority receipt instances
long provider SLO, restart/re-query, retry/dead-letter, and domain activity soak evidence

active_callers: study_runtime records runtime events and snapshots
functional_module_inventory.retention_reason: MAS can index paper-line owner receipts and locators as a domain sidecar reference adapter; generic persistence, lifecycle indexing, restore/retention, and receipt ledger ownership stay in OPL.

active_callers: paper work-unit controller and sidecar dispatch source refs
functional_module_inventory.retention_reason: Paper work-unit identity, publication gate context, and artifact delta obligations are MAS domain facts.
MAS may expose study/workspace refs and artifact authority receipts; generic cleanup policy belongs to OPL.
Source quality, medical evidence readiness, and literature relevance remain MAS domain authority.
MAS keeps publication-route memory body, recall policy, and accept/reject/blocker writeback verdict.
Canonical manuscript/package mutation and rebuild proof are MAS artifact authority.
MAS retains per-study route map, quality/source refs, blockers, and safe action receipt projection.
MAS keeps read-only paper progress facts and domain blocker explanations.
MAS must keep owner-route facts, publication gate blockers, safe action refs, and no-forbidden-write evidence.
MAS keeps domain command handlers, direct domain entry, and owner receipts; OPL owns CLI/MCP/Skill/product/status descriptor projection and routing shell.
MAS retains paper-progress SLO semantics and local scheduler tombstone provenance only.
MAS keeps stage closeout semantics, owner receipts, and recovery owner decisions.
MAS owns medical transition semantics and oracle fixtures; OPL executes the generic state-machine transport.

functional_module_inventory.cannot_absorb_reason: Medical study truth and paper route state are domain facts, not framework runtime state.
OPL cannot authorize manuscript quality, publication readiness, or medical reviewer verdicts.
Canonical manuscript/package mutation and submission authority are MAS artifact authority.

functional_module_inventory.retention_reason: Local LaunchAgent adapter code is retired; provenance remains for history and no-active-caller proof.

functional_module_inventory.migration_action: remove generated wrappers and keep history/tombstone refs only
functional_module_inventory.retention_reason: Needed only to detect and clean stale workspace-local service wrappers.

projection_only_surfaces: OPL generated Skill descriptor targeting MAS domain entry
product-entry manifest domain action intent metadata
